notes:
v2.6.55 — Auto-migrate old settings on first run

- Existing users no longer need to import JSON after updating
- On first launch, bot detects old bt_tl_quality_min value (70) and resets to 30
- Migration runs once automatically, then saves the corrected settings
- Custom values set by user are preserved (only exact old default 70 is reset)
- New installs unaffected (already get correct defaults)
